# Conflict Practice File

Instructions: two people must edit the same line below at the same time.
One pushes first. The other will need to resolve the conflict when pulling.

--- Edit this line only ---

Current project status: [EDIT HERE]

--- Do not edit below ---

Remember: a conflict is not an error — it is a normal situation when working as a team.
Git just needs you, the human, to decide which version is correct.
